meaning: n.[生物] 受精卵,接合子,接合体
examples: The zygote undergoes a long period of dormancy.
The effect of gamete treatment was similiar to that of zygote treatment.
The zygote is best appraised by stating that it is an inherently unstable entity.
Broun (R-GA) introduced a bill in Congress that would permit the states to take any action whatsoever (which could include the initiation of criminal proceedings) to protect the life of a zygote.
